proposal_summary: A proposal to create a streaming COMP grant (0.000214 Contributor Comp Speed) for Getty Hill to compensate for past and future work on coordinating and improving Compound's oracle system.

disclosed_entities.name: Getty Hill
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Over the last 6-months, Getty Hill has worked to improve Compound’s oracle system

disclosed_entities.name: Compound
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: highest possible standard demanded by the Compound community.

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Provide a continuous grant of 0.000214 to Getty Hill until modified by governance.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: I am requesting a 0.000214 Contributor Comp Speed grant from the protocol. [...] The grant runs in perpetuity until modified by governance.

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal only involves setting up a streaming payment (Comp Speed grant) for a single contributor.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: This Contributor Grant will be used to carry on the work of improving the price feed, and represents the first streaming COMP grant.

limitations: No recipient address provided for Getty Hill.
No specific contract or function names provided to execute the streaming grant.
